Sports Scene

Copied

At the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics, Friday's late medal event schedule includes the rhythmic gymnastics individual all-around final at 14:30 (GMT+2).

In table tennis, China will face Sweden in the men's team final at 15:00 (GMT+2).

In diving, China's Chen Yiwen and Chang Yani will battle for the individual gold medal in the women's 3m springboard at 15:00 (GMT+2).

And China's women's field hockey team has returned to the final after 16 years, and will meet the Netherlands in the gold medal contest at 20:00 (GMT+2).
